content.description: Annotation text shown on charts to describe the change, release, or incident.

date_marker.description: When this annotation happened (ISO 8601 timestamp). Used to position it on charts.

emoji.description: Optional emoji shown in place of the default badge when this annotation is surfaced on a chart.

hidden_in_user_interface.description: When true, the annotation is hidden from the PostHog UI (charts and the annotations list) but still readable over the API and MCP. Use for high-frequency markers like deployments that would otherwise crowd the UI. Null (the default) means the annotation is shown.

scope.description:
Annotation visibility scope: `project`, `organization`, `dashboard`, or `dashboard_item`. `recording` is deprecated and rejected.

* `dashboard_item` - insight
* `dashboard` - dashboard
* `project` - project
* `organization` - organization
* `recording` - recording
